title: Assistant Store Manager - Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services!
